title: Automations “Manage” view not loading across browsers/accounts

posts.author: xavierccc (Xavier)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I’m having an issue with the Automations “Manage” view not loading.

Symptoms:
– When I click Automate → Manage automations, the panel opens and I see the skeleton/ghost rows, but the automations list never finishes loading.
– This happens on multiple boards and different board types.
– The Automation Center (recipes gallery) loads normally.
– I’m an admin on the account.

Troubleshooting I’ve already done:
– Tried Chrome and Microsoft Edge
– Tried incognito/private mode
– Tried the monday.com desktop app
– Logged into a different monday.com account and saw the same issue there

Since it affects multiple accounts, browsers, and the desktop app, it seems like it might be a bug with the Automations “Manage” view globally (or possibly for my region).

Could you please check if there’s a known issue with this and let me know if there’s any workaround while it’s being fixed?

Thank you!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was having that issue yesterday on random boards (I’ve used monday for 5+ years and that was the first time). It seems fixed today, have you tried it?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
